conjecture_title: Open problem: hero status of $\Delta(1,m,m')$ for degree-4 oriented stars
paper_title: On heroes in digraphs with forbidden induced forests
summary: The source paper (published in European Journal of Combinatorics 125, 2025) establishes that for an oriented star $F$ of degree 4, the only heroes in $F$-free digraphs are transitive tournaments or digraphs of the form $\Delta(1,m,m')$, but leaves open the question of which pairs $(m,m')$ make $\{\Delta(1,m,m'), F\}$ $\vec{\chi}$-finite. A wide web search found no subsequent paper resolving this problem for any specific values of $m, m' \geq 1$.
search_queries: heroes digraphs chi-finite oriented star degree 4 Delta(1,m,m') Carbonero Koerts Moore Spirkl 2306.04710
chi-bounded dichromatic heroes digraphs oriented star forbidden induced forest arXiv 2023 2024
notes: No follow-up found resolving the open problem. The paper itself appeared in European Journal of Combinatorics 125 (2025). The related paper arXiv:2602.08736 ('(Claw, C_3)-free Digraphs with Unbounded Dichromatic Number') was found but its abstract does not address the Delta(1,m,m') question. The conjecture remains open with high confidence.
